title: L2 Hostility Fabricated
body:
## 🪄Introduction

This is the fabric port of [L2 Hostility](https://modrinth.com/mod/l2hostility).

All recipes of enchantments in the original mod are implemented using [Enchantment Infusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-infusion).

## 🧩Compatibility

This mod has built-in REI and EMI compatible plugins, which means you can use either to view all recipes in this mod.

## ✉️Feedback

This mod is still in Beta stage.

**DO NOT report any issues to the original mod.**

If there are any bugs or suggestions, please provide feedback to [HERE](https://github.com/Karashok-Leo/L2Hostility-Fabricated/issues).
